title: delphinium menziesii var. pauciflorum
intro: Delphinium menziesii var. pauciflorum, also known as the Pacific larkspur, is a perennial plant native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include relieving symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating fever and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, although its toxicity and potential side effects should be carefully considered before consumption.
